evals.prompt: Can you get Trebble ready to ship? I want the build file and fresh screenshots of every screen for the app store.
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/release.sh; produces release/builds/trebble-<version>.pbw and release/screenshots/<platform>/NN-<screen>.png for every target platform; reports the bundle path and screenshot count.

evals.prompt: Regenerate the app screenshots for all the watch models — the README ones are stale.
evals.expected_output: Runs the screenshot pass across all platforms (build optional), saving numbered per-screen PNGs under release/screenshots/<platform>/.

evals.prompt: Just build me the release bundle, skip the screenshots for now.
The chalk and basalt screenshots came out blank last time, can you redo just those two?
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/release.sh basalt chalk, optionally with a larger TREBBLE_LOAD_WAIT, capturing only those platforms.
